scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix frontend-admin && npm install --prefix partner-portals
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,admin,event-portal,store-portal -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend-admin run dev" "npm --prefix partner-portals run dev:event" "npm --prefix partner-portals run dev:store"
scripts.env:check: npm --prefix backend run env:check && npm --prefix frontend run build:test && npm --prefix frontend-admin run build:test && npm --prefix partner-portals run env:check
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend-admin run build
scripts.build:staging: npm --prefix frontend run build:staging && npm --prefix frontend-admin run build:staging
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend run build:test && npm --prefix frontend-admin run build:test && npm --prefix partner-portals run test
